# BaSYS Reference Rules

These documents are Codex reference material converted from Cursor `.mdc` rules.
They are not Codex command-permission rules. Codex should read them only when the
task touches the corresponding BaSYS area.

Use `AGENTS.md` as the entry point. It maps common task types to these files.

## Files

- `general-conventions.md` - shared BaSYS metadata conventions.
- `commands.md` - form commands and companion command scripts.
- `constructor-forms.md` - constructor form JSON files.
- `programmable-forms.md` - programmable Vue forms.
- `records-creation.md` - registry posting and records sources.
- `workflows.md` - workflow metadata and workflow step scripts.
- `menu.md` - navigation menu metadata.
- `data-view-reports.md` - data views, reports, dashboards, charts.
- `excel-reports.md` - Excel reports with `.xlsx` templates.
- `print-forms.md` - print forms owned by a metaobject.
